conceptClusters.title: Retained artifact and HTML purpose
exitEvidence: Learner preserves source, preview, saved revision, and passing evidence while moving work into a learner-owned project.
Learner keeps HTML content and meaning intact while distinguishing file management from page structure.

conceptClusters.title: Local resources and accessible input
exitEvidence: Learner maps processor, memory, storage, operating system, application, input, and output evidence to bounded roles.
Learner completes equivalent safe tasks through keyboard and another supported input path and chooses a reversible ergonomic adjustment.

conceptClusters.title: Tool roles and transfer boundaries
exitEvidence: Learner selects editor, browser, developer tools, terminal, version control, graphics, testing, or deployment tools by evidence-producing job.
Learner identifies which simulator result still requires verification in an authentic toolchain.

conceptClusters.title: Reversible bounded file operations
exitEvidence: Learner predicts and performs create, select, copy, move, rename, delete, restore, and search operations inside a project boundary.
Learner recovers a mistaken rename or deletion without touching unrelated or operating-system files.

conceptClusters.title: Portable file identity
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes display label, base name, extension, encoded content, MIME handling, case, and public URL.
Learner repairs Windows-like and case-sensitive path cases with portable names and separators.

conceptClusters.title: Project roots folders and paths
exitEvidence: Learner designs a project root with clear ownership and portable entry, style, script, media, and data relationships.
Learner moves documents and assets and repairs every affected reference without machine-specific paths.

conceptClusters.title: Search type and content evidence
exitEvidence: Learner locates changed targets among same-name and wrong-extension distractors using multiple evidence fields.
Learner classifies common web files by inspected content and preserves a safe boundary for unknown files.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked HTML notice moves from platform draft to a learner-owned project while resource, input, tool, file, path, and inspection consequences remain visible.
activityDesigns.startingState: A valid saved notice, simulated local computer, bounded project area, file tree, source, preview, and evidence panel are synchronized.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner has predicted and explained fourteen local-project decisions without performing destructive host operations or losing HTML meaning.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts prediction with observed resource, input, tool, file-tree, path, content, preview, and saved-revision evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one consequence at a time after prediction and keeps all operations inside a deterministic project simulator.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss returns to a smaller reversible scenario, requires a revised prediction, and checks a changed project state.

interactions.title: Retrieve artifact state
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which HTML source, preview, saved draft, and passing checkpoint revision must enter the learner-owned project.
interactions.artifactChange: No change; source-of-truth revision is selected.

evidence.observable: Selected revision preserves valid source and separates save from passing evidence.
evidence.changedCase: A newer unsaved edit and older passing checkpoint are introduced.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale or unsaved revision chosen for transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Order edit, parse, save, and check events before selecting.

interactions.title: Preserve HTML purpose
interactions.learnerAction: Explain why moving or renaming the source file does not turn file organization into HTML content or semantics.
interactions.artifactChange: No edit; content meaning and file identity are contrasted.

evidence.observable: Explanation separates page meaning from storage location and file-manager operations.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Folders or file names described as HTML semantics.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare unchanged DOM meaning before and after a file move.

interactions.title: Map local resource roles
interactions.learnerAction: Match processor, memory, persistent storage, operating system, application, input, and output observations to bounded roles.
interactions.artifactChange: Resource observations are labeled without changing project state.

evidence.observable: Every observation maps to its bounded role without hardware performance promises.
evidence.changedCase: Memory pressure and low storage appear separately.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Memory and persistent storage treated as interchangeable.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace running state and saved bytes through restart.

interactions.title: Predict constrained preview evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which supplied resource observation can explain a bounded slow preview without claiming a universal hardware cause.
interactions.artifactChange: A simulated constraint changes while the notice remains saved.

evidence.observable: Prediction cites observed process evidence and states uncertainty.
evidence.changedCase: Storage fills while memory remains available.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Processor, memory, or network blamed without evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Choose only observations that changed with the symptom.

interactions.title: Compare supported input paths
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect keyboard, pointer, touch, and alternative-input paths for the same safe file selection and rename preview.
interactions.artifactChange: No operation commits; equivalent previews are compared.

evidence.observable: Each supported path reaches the same bounded result with visible focus and confirmation.
evidence.changedCase: The target file moves to another folder and paths remain operable.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One input method assumed universally easier or accessible.
interactions.correctionRoute: Follow one equivalent path without device assumptions.

interactions.title: Choose reversible ergonomic adjustment
interactions.learnerAction: Explain one posture, reach, repetition, or break risk and choose a reversible adjustment without medical diagnosis.
interactions.artifactChange: An input plan records one reversible adjustment.

evidence.observable: Adjustment is specific, optional, reversible, and preserves equivalent task access.
evidence.changedCase: Input device and workspace reach constraints change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Universal body claim or inaccessible shortcut mandate.
interactions.correctionRoute: Describe task demand and test one reversible alternative.

interactions.title: Select evidence-producing tools
interactions.learnerAction: Choose tools for source edit, DOM inspection, computed style, request evidence, revision history, graphics, testing, and deployment transfer.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight jobs are assigned to smallest suitable tools.

evidence.observable: Selections follow evidence-producing roles rather than professional stereotypes.
evidence.changedCase: A request failure and image-edit requirement replace two jobs.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One application selected to prove every requirement.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name required evidence before choosing a tool.

interactions.title: Name simulator transfer limits
interactions.learnerAction: Explain which file operations are proven in simulation and which deployment or operating-system behavior still needs authentic verification.
interactions.artifactChange: A transfer-boundary note joins model evidence.

evidence.observable: Explanation names verified evidence, unverified external behavior, and safe next tool.
evidence.changedCase: Target changes from local preview to case-sensitive hosting.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Simulator result overclaimed as external deployment proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate current evidence surface from target environment.

interactions.title: Predict file-operation consequences
interactions.learnerAction: Predict paths and references after create, copy, move, rename, delete, restore, and search operations on a disposable notice project.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven operations are previewed but not committed.

evidence.observable: Predictions name resulting paths, duplicates, broken references, recovery evidence, and boundaries.
evidence.changedCase: Operation order and target folder change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Move treated as icon relocation with unchanged references.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace old path, new path, and each dependent reference.

interactions.title: Inspect delete and restore evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect a reversible deletion, retained evidence, restore target, collision warning, and unaffected project files.
interactions.artifactChange: A disposable file is deleted and restored inside simulator.

evidence.observable: Restore returns correct content and path without touching unrelated files.
evidence.changedCase: Original path is occupied before restore.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Permanent-delete assumptions or unsafe overwrite.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect recovery source, destination, and collision policy.

interactions.title: Predict portable name behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict resolution for spaces, mixed case, hidden extensions, renamed extensions, and URL-safe separators across two file-system models.
interactions.artifactChange: Five naming cases are evaluated without changing saved project.

evidence.observable: Prediction distinguishes name, case, extension, content, MIME handling, and URL.
evidence.changedCase: Deployment changes from case-insensitive to case-sensitive.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Extension rename assumed to convert file content.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect name metadata and actual bytes separately.

interactions.title: Trace project-root relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect entry document, styles, scripts, media, and data paths from one bounded project root.
interactions.artifactChange: A worked project tree and reference graph are highlighted.

evidence.observable: Every owned file and portable reference resolves from its actual location.
evidence.changedCase: Entry document moves one folder deeper.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Folder name assumed to auto-resolve nested assets.
interactions.correctionRoute: Resolve each reference from source document location.

interactions.title: Predict move and rename fallout
interactions.learnerAction: Predict every affected reference when a document moves and a media asset changes portable name.
interactions.artifactChange: Move and rename are previewed in a reference graph.

evidence.observable: Prediction identifies all and only affected relative paths and no machine-specific path.
evidence.changedCase: Move direction and asset folder change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Only visible file tree updated while references stay stale.
interactions.correctionRoute: Recompute each path from referencing document.

interactions.title: Find and verify target file
interactions.learnerAction: Search same-name and wrong-extension distractors, inspect content and metadata, and explain why the selected file is safe and correct.
interactions.artifactChange: A verified target and unknown-file safety note are recorded.

evidence.observable: Selection uses name, location, extension, content, and modification evidence rather than icon.
evidence.changedCase: Target content and modification time change among distractors.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Icon or extension accepted as proof of type and safety.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect at least two independent evidence fields.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A community-garden HTML notice becomes a portable learner-owned project through reversible operations, accessible input, deliberate tool selection, stable paths, and verified file content.
activityDesigns.startingState: A valid saved garden notice exists in platform storage; a deterministic local-project simulator starts empty with explicit import and recovery boundaries.
activityDesigns.completionState: The garden project survives reload, alternate input, case-sensitive transfer, document and asset moves, name changes, distractor searches, and cumulative HTML validation.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports observed resource, input, tool, file, reference, content, preview, or saved-state evidence and one bounded next action.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Three progressive hints move from consequence, to evidence location, to a smaller parallel operation without supplying final tree or path.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed checkpoint restores a safe snapshot, requires a revised prediction, and applies a different garden-data or path mutation before continuing.

interactions.title: Inspect garden revision states
interactions.learnerAction: Identify current source, preview, saved draft, passing checkpoint, and export candidate before importing the garden notice.
interactions.artifactChange: No import occurs; five revision states are labeled.

evidence.observable: Export candidate is current, saved, and independently passing.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stale, failing, or unsaved revision selected.
interactions.correctionRoute: Order edit, save, check, and export evidence.

interactions.title: Predict project import state
interactions.learnerAction: Predict source, file path, preview, saved-local state, and platform checkpoint after importing the selected notice.
interactions.artifactChange: Import remains previewed but uncommitted.

evidence.observable: Prediction separates copied local file from unchanged platform revision and check state.
evidence.changedCase: Platform draft changes after local import.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Import assumed to move or synchronize every revision automatically.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each storage location and revision independently.

interactions.title: Import the passing notice
interactions.learnerAction: Import the verified HTML source into the bounded garden project root and save the local project state.
interactions.artifactChange: A local HTML file contains the exact passing source.

evidence.observable: Reload restores exact local bytes and separate platform evidence.
evidence.changedCase: One local text edit remains local after reload.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Wrong revision imported or source content altered.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare source digest and revision labels before retry.

interactions.title: Verify HTML meaning after import
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect heading, prose, and list meaning in the imported preview with author styles absent.
interactions.artifactChange: Styles are disabled for semantic comparison.

evidence.observable: Imported page preserves required HTML content and relationships.
evidence.changedCase: Garden hours and one list item change locally.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Successful file import mistaken for preserved semantic behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare source and DOM requirements, not file existence.

interactions.title: Predict local edit divergence
interactions.learnerAction: Predict local preview, local save, platform draft, and passing evidence after changing garden hours only in the project file.
interactions.artifactChange: A local-only hour edit is previewed.

evidence.observable: Prediction preserves independent local and platform revision histories.
evidence.changedCase: The platform source changes independently afterward.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local and platform storage assumed live-synchronized.
interactions.correctionRoute: Label which operation writes each location.

interactions.title: Save a local HTML revision
interactions.learnerAction: Apply and save the garden-hour edit locally, then run cumulative HTML behavior checks.
interactions.artifactChange: Local source and preview reflect updated garden hours.

evidence.observable: Reload restores the edit and semantic checks pass on current local source.
evidence.changedCase: A longer hour notice preserves structure.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Edit visible but unsaved or semantically malformed.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate edit, save, reload, and check steps.

interactions.title: Test independent revision histories
interactions.learnerAction: Change local and platform copies differently, reload both, and identify each passing or failing evidence record.
interactions.artifactChange: Two controlled revisions diverge without merging.

evidence.observable: Each source, preview, saved state, and check remains tied to its own revision.
evidence.changedCase: One copy reverts while the other advances.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Evidence from one storage location attributed to another.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match revision identifier to every observation.

interactions.title: Explain learner project ownership
interactions.learnerAction: Explain what is copied, what remains separate, and how HTML purpose survives learner-owned storage and file operations.
interactions.artifactChange: An ownership and semantic-boundary note is recorded.

evidence.observable: Explanation distinguishes content meaning, file identity, storage, revision, preview, and evidence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Ownership described as automatic sync or changed semantics.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace one source revision through both locations.

interactions.title: Inspect local component roles
interactions.learnerAction: Match processor activity, memory use, saved storage bytes, operating-system paths, editor process, keyboard input, and display output.
interactions.artifactChange: Resource evidence labels join the garden project record.

evidence.observable: All component observations map to bounded roles and current process evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Editor closes and unsaved memory state disappears.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Running memory confused with saved project storage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Follow data before and after process restart.

interactions.title: Predict unsaved memory loss
interactions.learnerAction: Predict local source, preview, and persisted file after an unsaved edit, process termination, and editor restart.
interactions.artifactChange: A disposable unsaved edit is held in simulated memory.

evidence.observable: Prediction separates process memory from persistent storage and restored source.
evidence.changedCase: Autosave commits before termination in a parallel trace.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All visible editor state assumed permanently stored.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mark each write to persistent storage.

interactions.title: Diagnose bounded preview pressure
interactions.learnerAction: Compare supplied processor, memory, storage, and process evidence during one slow garden preview and identify supported causes and unknowns.
interactions.artifactChange: A controlled resource constraint affects preview timing.

evidence.observable: Diagnosis cites correlated evidence and avoids hardware guarantees.
evidence.changedCase: Constraint changes from memory pressure to low storage.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Unobserved hardware component blamed with certainty.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use only evidence that changes with symptom.

interactions.title: Explain local resource limits
interactions.learnerAction: Explain how current evidence bounds processor, memory, storage, operating-system, and application claims for the garden project.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded resource diagnosis is recorded.

evidence.observable: Explanation separates observed constraints, plausible effects, and unverified claims.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Generic faster-hardware recommendation without evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: State observation, consequence, and uncertainty separately.

interactions.title: Trace keyboard file selection
interactions.learnerAction: Complete focus navigation, selection, operation preview, cancel, and confirmation for a garden file using keyboard only.
interactions.artifactChange: A keyboard operation trace is recorded without committing change.

evidence.observable: Visible focus, labels, preview, cancel, and confirmation remain keyboard operable.
evidence.changedCase: Target moves into a nested folder.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Keyboard path skips preview or confirmation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Follow focus order and announced state one control at a time.

interactions.title: Trace alternate input operation
interactions.learnerAction: Complete the equivalent garden file preview and cancel with another supported input path and compare result parity.
interactions.artifactChange: An alternate-input trace joins keyboard evidence.

evidence.observable: Both paths expose same target, consequence, cancel, and result evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Control order and target name change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Alternate path loses information or safe cancellation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare task states rather than gesture shape.

interactions.title: Test input parity on rename
interactions.learnerAction: Rename and undo a disposable garden file once through keyboard and once through another supported path.
interactions.artifactChange: Two equivalent rename-undo cycles complete.

evidence.observable: Both paths create identical paths, reference warnings, undo, and announcements.
evidence.changedCase: A naming collision appears before confirmation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One path bypasses collision or reference evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare each operation state across inputs.

interactions.title: Choose sustainable input setup
interactions.learnerAction: Identify one reach or repetition risk in the workshop and choose a reversible input, posture, or break adjustment.
interactions.artifactChange: A learner-selected ergonomic plan is saved.

evidence.observable: Plan is optional, reversible, task-specific, and preserves access.
evidence.changedCase: Available device and reach constraints change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Medical claim or one-body universal prescription.
interactions.correctionRoute: Describe task demand and test one safe alternative.

interactions.title: Choose source editing tool
interactions.learnerAction: Choose the smallest suitable tool to edit garden HTML while preserving source, syntax, save, and diff evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: A tool choice and required evidence are recorded.

evidence.observable: Editor is selected for source work without claiming preview or deployment proof.
evidence.changedCase: Requirement changes to binary image editing.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser preview or file manager selected as source editor.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name evidence-producing job before tool.

interactions.title: Choose DOM inspection tool
interactions.learnerAction: Choose a tool for parsed DOM evidence and explain why source view or visual preview alone is insufficient.
interactions.artifactChange: A DOM-inspection tool and evidence contract are selected.

evidence.observable: Browser developer tools are chosen for parsed structure, with source limitations named.
evidence.changedCase: Requirement changes to computed style inspection.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Editor source assumed to prove browser-created DOM.
interactions.correctionRoute: Identify whether evidence concerns authored source or parsed output.

interactions.title: Choose request evidence tool
interactions.learnerAction: Choose a tool to inspect a failed garden asset request and separate path evidence from image-editing work.
interactions.artifactChange: Request and graphics jobs receive different tools.

evidence.observable: Network inspection and graphics editing roles remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Failure changes from request path to corrupt image bytes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Graphics editor used to prove request path or browser used to edit pixels.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name the failing evidence layer first.

interactions.title: Inspect revision evidence options
interactions.learnerAction: Compare saved copy, undo history, file diff, and version-control evidence for recovering a garden change.
interactions.artifactChange: Four revision evidence sources are compared.

evidence.observable: Each option's scope, persistence, and transfer limits are identified.
evidence.changedCase: Editor closes and local undo history disappears.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Undo history assumed durable version control.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare retention after process and project restart.

interactions.title: Match tool to garden tasks
interactions.learnerAction: Match editor, browser, developer tools, terminal, version control, graphics, testing, and deployment to eight changed garden jobs.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight task-tool-evidence triples are tested.

evidence.observable: Each smallest suitable tool produces required evidence and no overclaim.
evidence.changedCase: Two jobs combine and require a deliberate tool sequence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tool chosen by prestige or familiarity instead of evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: State task output and evidence before selection.

interactions.title: Inspect simulated tool boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Identify which editor, preview, file, and test claims are proven by the garden simulator and which remain external.
interactions.artifactChange: A verified-versus-transfer matrix is completed.

evidence.observable: Every simulator claim has explicit evidence and every external claim has a target tool.
evidence.changedCase: Deployment target becomes case-sensitive static hosting.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Simulation overclaimed as operating-system or deployment proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name current evidence surface and target environment.

interactions.title: Run a two-tool diagnosis
interactions.learnerAction: Use file inspection then browser request evidence to distinguish missing asset bytes from a broken asset path.
interactions.artifactChange: A controlled asset fault is diagnosed without editing pixels.

evidence.observable: Tool sequence isolates content existence from request resolution.
evidence.changedCase: Fault changes from missing file to corrupt contents.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First tool's evidence treated as complete diagnosis.
interactions.correctionRoute: Identify question unanswered by first evidence source.

interactions.title: Explain tool transfer boundary
interactions.learnerAction: Explain one simulator-proven garden result and the authentic toolchain check needed before deployment.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded transfer plan is saved.

evidence.observable: Plan states current evidence, missing external evidence, and safe verification tool.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local simulator result called production verification.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate artifact behavior from target-environment behavior.

interactions.title: Predict folder creation state
interactions.learnerAction: Predict paths, selection, saved state, and unaffected files after creating the garden project root and asset folders.
interactions.artifactChange: Folder creation is previewed but not committed.

evidence.observable: Prediction names exact new paths and preserves project boundary.
evidence.changedCase: A same-name folder already exists.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Creation collision or location ignored.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect parent path and collision policy.

interactions.title: Create bounded project folders
interactions.learnerAction: Create garden project, media, and notes folders inside the simulator without touching unrelated files.
interactions.artifactChange: Three owned folders become persisted project state.

evidence.observable: Exact folder paths exist and outside tree remains unchanged.
evidence.changedCase: An optional data folder is added later.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Folder created outside project root or existing item overwritten.
interactions.correctionRoute: Restore snapshot and verify parent boundary.

interactions.title: Predict copy versus move
interactions.learnerAction: Predict source and destination existence, content identity, references, and undo evidence for copying versus moving a garden image.
interactions.artifactChange: Copy and move alternatives are previewed.

evidence.observable: Prediction distinguishes duplicate from relocated identity and reference fallout.
evidence.changedCase: Destination contains a same-name file.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Copy and move assumed identical icon placement changes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Track source existence and destination content after operation.

interactions.title: Copy an original asset safely
interactions.learnerAction: Copy the original garden image into media while retaining source, verifying content digest, and avoiding collision overwrite.
interactions.artifactChange: A verified project-owned image copy joins media.

evidence.observable: Both copies exist with expected content and no unrelated change.
evidence.changedCase: Destination name is occupied before a second copy.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Source moved, collision overwritten, or bytes unverified.
interactions.correctionRoute: Restore snapshot and compare operation preview.

interactions.title: Predict rename reference fallout
interactions.learnerAction: Predict file path, public reference, preview request, search result, and undo after renaming the garden image.
interactions.artifactChange: Rename is previewed with dependent references.

evidence.observable: Prediction identifies broken old path and required reference repair.
evidence.changedCase: Image has two references from different folders.

interactions.feedbackTarget: References assumed to follow rename automatically.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every old-path consumer.

interactions.title: Rename and repair atomically
interactions.learnerAction: Rename the image inside project boundary, repair all garden references, and save a reversible checkpoint.
interactions.artifactChange: Image and all references use the new path.

evidence.observable: Old path disappears, new path resolves, preview passes, and undo evidence exists.
evidence.changedCase: A second reference is inserted before another rename.

interactions.feedbackTarget: File renamed while one reference remains stale.
interactions.correctionRoute: Search old path and repair each observed consumer.

interactions.title: Delete restore and resolve collision
interactions.learnerAction: Delete a disposable garden note, inspect recovery evidence, create a path collision, and restore to a safe chosen destination.
interactions.artifactChange: Deleted note returns without overwriting collision target.

evidence.observable: Correct content, destination, collision handling, and unaffected files are verified.
evidence.changedCase: Original parent folder moves before restore.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Unsafe overwrite or wrong recovered version.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect recovery identity, content, and destination separately.

interactions.title: Explain reversible operation chain
interactions.learnerAction: Explain create, copy, move, rename, delete, restore, search, references, and recovery boundaries in the garden history.
interactions.artifactChange: An operation-consequence timeline is recorded.

evidence.observable: Every operation names before state, after state, dependencies, and recovery evidence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Operation list without path or reference consequences.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace one file identity through the full chain.

interactions.title: Separate file identity fields
interactions.learnerAction: Identify display label, base name, extension, content bytes, MIME handling, case, path, and public URL for the garden image.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight identity fields are annotated.

evidence.observable: Every field remains distinct and evidence-backed.
evidence.changedCase: Display label changes while file identity does not.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Label, name, extension, type, and URL conflated.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect metadata and content separately.

interactions.title: Predict extension rename behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict bytes, decoded type, MIME handling, icon, and preview after renaming an image extension without conversion.
interactions.artifactChange: Extension-only rename is simulated without saving.

evidence.observable: Prediction preserves bytes and distinguishes metadata from actual encoding.
evidence.changedCase: A text file receives an image extension.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Extension rename assumed to convert contents.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect magic bytes or content before and after rename.

interactions.title: Predict case-sensitive deployment
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which garden references resolve under case-insensitive and case-sensitive path models.
interactions.artifactChange: Two path-resolution models run side by side.

evidence.observable: Prediction finds every case mismatch and avoids operating-system assumptions.
evidence.changedCase: Folder and extension case drift independently.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Local case behavior generalized to all deployment targets.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare exact reference string with exact file path.

interactions.title: Apply portable garden names
interactions.learnerAction: Rename garden files using intentional extensions, portable characters, consistent case, and URL-safe separators.
interactions.artifactChange: All project file names follow one portable convention.

evidence.observable: Names resolve across both file-system models and references update.
evidence.changedCase: A new multiword asset follows convention independently.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Spaces, hidden extension, or mixed-case references remain.
interactions.correctionRoute: Audit exact names and consumers under both models.

interactions.title: Test URL-safe references
interactions.learnerAction: Resolve every garden file through its public relative URL after spaces, case, and separator variations.
interactions.artifactChange: Reference variants exercise portable names.

evidence.observable: Canonical portable URLs resolve and drifted variants fail predictably.
evidence.changedCase: Project root name and one asset path change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser encoding assumed to repair inconsistent identity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare URL segments to exact portable paths.

interactions.title: Inspect hidden extension ambiguity
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect same-label garden files with hidden, doubled, and wrong extensions using full-name and content evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Three ambiguous identities are compared.

evidence.observable: Full names and content distinguish every distractor.
evidence.changedCase: Icon and display label become identical.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Displayed label trusted as complete file identity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reveal full name and inspect content evidence.

interactions.title: Test changed platform cases
interactions.learnerAction: Run garden names through Windows-like, case-sensitive, URL, and MIME-handling scenarios and repair all inconsistencies.
interactions.artifactChange: Portable identity passes four environment models.

evidence.observable: Same intended assets resolve with correct content and handling everywhere.
evidence.changedCase: A new archive and data file join the project.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One local environment treated as portability proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair first exact identity mismatch per environment.

interactions.title: Explain portable identity
interactions.learnerAction: Explain garden base names, extensions, content, MIME behavior, case, path, labels, and public URLs through one changed example.
interactions.artifactChange: A portable-identity explanation is saved.

evidence.observable: Explanation keeps every identity layer distinct and connected.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Extension or icon used as sole type evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace one file from bytes to public URL.

interactions.title: Plan garden project root
interactions.learnerAction: Predict a clear project root and folders for entry document, styles, scripts, media, notes, and bounded data without receiving final tree.
interactions.artifactChange: A candidate tree and ownership rationale are drafted.

evidence.observable: Every required file has one owned location and portable relationship.
evidence.changedCase: A second HTML document and shared image are added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Folders copied from recipe without requirement mapping.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map each artifact role to one ownership boundary.

interactions.title: Build the garden tree
interactions.learnerAction: Create the chosen folders and move files into owned locations while preserving a reversible operation checkpoint.
interactions.artifactChange: Project files occupy the planned portable tree.

evidence.observable: Tree ownership, names, file content, and reversible history pass.
evidence.changedCase: A data file and second media type join later.

interactions.feedbackTarget: File placement changes without owned boundaries or recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Restore snapshot and apply one planned move at a time.

interactions.title: Resolve relative paths
interactions.learnerAction: Predict paths from entry and nested documents to styles, scripts, media, and data before testing them.
interactions.artifactChange: A reference graph is completed before source edits.

evidence.observable: Every path resolves from referencing document without machine-specific roots.
evidence.changedCase: One document moves into a pages folder.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A lost-asset incident is reconstructed from revision, resource, input, tool, operation, identity, path, and content evidence before bounded recovery.

activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback exposes earliest contradictory observation and requests a causal hypothesis before revealing any concept cue.
activityDesigns.hintContract: On-request hints point to evidence surface, then consequence class, then a different mini-incident; final path stays hidden.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Every repair must reproduce original fault in disposable state and survive a different move, rename, or distractor mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A learner independently converts a youth-club HTML page into a portable, accessible, recoverable, evidence-verified local project with no supplied final tree.

activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed requirement needs learner diagnosis, safe recovery, and a different club-data or path mutation before resubmission.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A retrieve-first set reconnects revision truth, HTML purpose, resource evidence, input parity, tool roles, operations, identity, paths, search, and safety.
